title: Deep Suite Compaction State Payload
description: Payload shape for compaction-state artifacts emitted when a long-running session compacts its context window. MUST be wrapped in the M3 artifact-envelope (schemas/artifact-envelope.schema.json) with envelope.schema = { name: 'compaction-state', version: '1.0' } and envelope.artifact_kind = 'compaction-state'. The dashboard aggregator (claude-deep-dashboard) consumes these to populate suite.compaction.frequency and suite.compaction.preserved_artifact_ratio M4-deferred metrics.

schema_version.description: Payload schema version. Locked to 1.0 for v1; forward-compat via x-* patternProperties. Breaking change → publish compaction-state-v2.schema.json.

compacted_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the compaction occurred.

trigger.description: What caused compaction. 'phase-transition' = deep-work Phase boundary. 'slice-green' = inline compaction after a slice tests pass. 'loop-epoch-end' = deep-evolve epoch boundary. 'window-threshold' = auto compaction at >80% context window. 'manual' = user invoked /compact or equivalent. 'session-stop' = compaction at Stop hook time to serialize state for resume.

session_id.description: Originating session identifier (e.g., deep-work session slug, deep-evolve session id). Required for dashboard's per-session frequency aggregation; recommended though not strictly enforced here.

preserved_artifact_paths.description: Concrete artifact paths the producer kept retrievable post-compaction. Cross-plugin readers (deep-dashboard) compute preserved_artifact_ratio = len(preserved) / (len(preserved) + len(discarded_artifact_paths)). Empty array means full reset (all artifacts discarded — only summary remains).

discarded_artifact_paths.description: Optional. Concrete artifact paths the producer dropped from memory. Together with preserved_artifact_paths drives the dashboard's preserved_artifact_ratio metric. Producers MAY omit if tracking only preserved paths.

discarded_summary.description: Human-readable summary of what was compacted away (e.g., 'Slice 1-3 RED/REFACTOR cycles, 47 tool calls, 12K tokens'). Audit-only — not machine-consumed.

pre_compaction_tokens.description: Optional. Estimated token count of context before compaction. Producer-side measurement (e.g., tokenizer on conversation log).

post_compaction_tokens.description: Optional. Estimated token count of context after compaction. Together with pre_compaction_tokens drives compression ratio.

compaction_strategy.description: How compaction was performed. Deliberately scoped to the compaction event (not the handoff snapshot): includes 'selective-message-drop' (preserve key turns, drop the rest) and 'full-reset' (drop everything; rely on session-receipt artifact for state). Does NOT include 'full-history' — that value only makes sense for handoff.context_window_state.compaction_strategy (which represents a snapshot at handoff time; a compaction event by definition discarded something). Producers SHOULD pick the closest match; use 'custom' + x-compaction-strategy-detail for novel strategies.
